objects.description: [APT-C-36](https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0099) has sent emails containing a link that appear to lead to an urgent notification from a government institution, at times using URL shorteners like cort[.]as, acortaurl[.]com, and gtly[.]to.(Citation: Kaspersky BlindEagle AUG 2024)(Citation: Check Point Blind Eagle MAR 2025)(Citation: Check Point Blind Eagle MAR 2025)(Citation: Recorded Future TAG-144 AUG 2025)
